title: Unify dual predicate engines: delegate evaluatePredicate → checkPredicate
boundary: state-machine.ts evaluatePredicate becomes thin adapter delegating to predicates.ts checkPredicate
consumer_purpose: All state machine transitions (LANE_STATE_MACHINE, CAMPAIGN_STATE_MACHINE) resolve through the typed predicate engine
claim_atoms: backward-compat fixes in 7 resolvers (retry budgets, scope_unsafe, context_sufficient, latest_validation_passed, all_gates_pass, event_exists, permission_denied)
all predicate kinds from LANE/CAMPAIGN state machines resolve correctly
content:
## Summary

Two predicate engines exist:
1. `evaluatePredicate()` in `state-machine.ts` — local heuristic checks simplified `SMRuntimeEvent` (type/timestamp/payload)
2. `checkPredicate()` in `predicates.ts` — typed engine uses rich `RuntimeEvent` from `event/runtime-event.ts`

This plan makes `evaluatePredicate` a thin adapter that builds a `PredicateContext` and delegates to `checkPredicate`.

## Key Challenge: Event Type Mismatch

SMRuntimeEvent has: `type`, `timestamp`, `payload`  
RuntimeEvent has: `eventType`, `ts`, `payloadJson`, `status`, `toolName`, `id`, `runId`, `correlationId`, `sessionId`, etc.

Resolvers access fields not on SMRuntimeEvent (`status`, `toolName`, `id`). Solution: augment events in the adapter + fix resolvers where augmentation is insufficient.

## Changes in predicates.ts

### A. Add `retryBudgets` to PredicateContext
```ts
export interface PredicateContext {
  readonly events: readonly RuntimeEvent[]
  readonly fileMemory: Map<string, FileContext>
  readonly claims: readonly string[]
  readonly sessionId: string
  readonly retryBudgets: Readonly<Record<string, number>>  // NEW
  readonly duckDbRanked?: readonly string[]
}
```

### B. Fix `resolveRetryBudgetRemaining` — use budget map
Replace event-counting logic with `ctx.retryBudgets[key]` read. Remove `limit` from spec usage (the budget map IS the source of truth).

### C. Fix `resolveRepairBudgetExhausted` — use budget map
Replace EditApplied-counting with `(ctx.retryBudgets["repair"] ?? 0) <= 0`. Remove TODO(TRUTH-2).

### D. Fix `all_gates_pass` — check for GatesAllPassed events
Replace stub with: check if any event has `eventType === EventName.GatesAllPassed`.

### E. Fix `resolveScopeUnsafe` — backward-compat with simplified events
Add check for `e.eventType === EventName.ScopeUnsafe` (in addition to existing denial/protected-access checks). Simplified events carry a ScopeUnsafe event type but no status field.

### F. Fix `resolveContextSufficient` — event-based fallback
When fileMemory/claims/sessionId are empty (default adapter), fall back to checking for `EventName.ContextSufficient` events.

### G. Fix `resolveLatestValidationPassed` — status from payload
When `e.status` is undefined, check `e.payloadJson?.status === "pass"` as fallback. Simplified events carry status in payload, not on the event root.

### H. Fix `resolveEventExists` — eventType via type
Map `e.type` as well as `e.eventType` (simplified events use `type`). Also handle `after` as both event ID and timestamp for backward compat.

### I. Fix `resolvePermissionDenied` — toolName from payload
When `e.toolName` is undefined, check `e.payloadJson?.tool` as fallback.

## Changes in state-machine.ts

### J. Rewrite `evaluatePredicate` as adapter
```ts
// Adapter: delegates to typed predicate engine (predicates.ts)
function evaluatePredicate(
  predicate: PredicateSpec,
  events: readonly RuntimeEvent[],
  state: CampaignState,
): boolean {
  const ctx: PredicateContext = {
    events: events.map(augmentEvent) as any,
    fileMemory: new Map(),
    claims: [],
    sessionId: "",
    retryBudgets: state.retryBudgets,
  }
  return checkPredicate(predicate, ctx).satisfied
}
```

### K. Add `augmentEvent` helper
Maps SMRuntimeEvent fields to RuntimeEvent-compatible fields:
- `eventType` ← `type`
- `ts` ← `timestamp`
- `payloadJson` ← `payload`
- `id` ← `timestamp ?? ""`
- Default `sessionId`, `runId`, `actor` values

### L. Add import for `checkPredicate`
```ts
import { checkPredicate, type PredicateSpec } from "./predicates"
```

### M. Remove all local switch-case predicate logic
Delete the ~100-line switch statement in evaluatePredicate.

## Verifications

1. Run `bun typecheck` in packages/opencode
2. Verify LANE_STATE_MACHINE transitions: created→scouting→scoped→planning→critic_review→approved→executing→validating→(repairing|red_team)→historian→checkpointed→returned
3. Verify CAMPAIGN_STATE_MACHINE transitions: created→scouting→scope_synthesis→lane_decomposition→lane_dispatch→lane_execution→integration_review→final_validation→push_ready→pushed
4. Verify blocked transitions: has_claim_conflict, child_blocked, scope_unsafe
5. Verify repair cycle: retry_budget_remaining, repair_budget_exhausted
